members.name: _Close
members.summary: Called when the multiplayer peer should be immediately closed (see [method MultiplayerPeer.close]).

members.name: _DisconnectPeer
members.summary: Called when the connected [param peer] should be forcibly disconnected (see [method MultiplayerPeer.disconnect_peer]).

members.name: _GetAvailablePacketCount
members.summary: Called when the available packet count is internally requested by the [MultiplayerAPI].

members.name: _GetConnectionStatus
members.summary: Called when the connection status is requested on the [MultiplayerPeer] (see [method MultiplayerPeer.get_connection_status]).

members.name: _GetMaxPacketSize
members.summary: Called when the maximum allowed packet size (in bytes) is requested by the [MultiplayerAPI].

members.name: _GetPacket
members.signature: public int _GetPacket(const uint8_t ** rBuffer, int32_t* rBufferSize)
members.summary: Called when a packet needs to be received by the [MultiplayerAPI], with [param r_buffer_size] being the size of the binary [param r_buffer] in bytes.

members.name: _GetPacketChannel
members.summary: Called to get the channel over which the next available packet was received. See [method MultiplayerPeer.get_packet_channel].

members.name: _GetPacketMode
members.summary: Called to get the transfer mode the remote peer used to send the next available packet. See [method MultiplayerPeer.get_packet_mode].

members.name: _GetPacketPeer
members.summary: Called when the ID of the [MultiplayerPeer] who sent the most recent packet is requested (see [method MultiplayerPeer.get_packet_peer]).

members.name: _GetPacketScript
members.summary: Called when a packet needs to be received by the [MultiplayerAPI], if [method _get_packet] isn't implemented. Use this when extending this class via GDScript.

members.name: _GetTransferChannel
members.summary: Called when the transfer channel to use is read on this [MultiplayerPeer] (see [member MultiplayerPeer.transfer_channel]).

members.name: _GetTransferMode
members.summary: Called when the transfer mode to use is read on this [MultiplayerPeer] (see [member MultiplayerPeer.transfer_mode]).

members.name: _GetUniqueId
members.summary: Called when the unique ID of this [MultiplayerPeer] is requested (see [method MultiplayerPeer.get_unique_id]). The value must be between [code]1[/code] and [code]2147483647[/code].

members.name: _IsRefusingNewConnections
members.summary: Called when the "refuse new connections" status is requested on this [MultiplayerPeer] (see [member MultiplayerPeer.refuse_new_connections]).

members.name: _IsServer
members.summary: Called when the "is server" status is requested on the [MultiplayerAPI]. See [method MultiplayerAPI.is_server].

members.name: _IsServerRelaySupported
members.summary: Called to check if the server can act as a relay in the current configuration. See [method MultiplayerPeer.is_server_relay_supported].

members.name: _Poll
members.summary: Called when the [MultiplayerAPI] is polled. See [method MultiplayerAPI.poll].

members.name: _PutPacket
members.signature: public int _PutPacket(const uint8_t* buffer, int bufferSize)
members.summary: Called when a packet needs to be sent by the [MultiplayerAPI], with [param buffer_size] being the size of the binary [param buffer] in bytes.

members.name: _PutPacketScript
members.summary: Called when a packet needs to be sent by the [MultiplayerAPI], if [method _put_packet] isn't implemented. Use this when extending this class via GDScript.

members.name: _SetRefuseNewConnections
members.summary: Called when the "refuse new connections" status is set on this [MultiplayerPeer] (see [member MultiplayerPeer.refuse_new_connections]).

members.name: _SetTargetPeer
members.summary: Called when the target peer to use is set for this [MultiplayerPeer] (see [method MultiplayerPeer.set_target_peer]).

members.name: _SetTransferChannel
members.summary: Called when the channel to use is set for this [MultiplayerPeer] (see [member MultiplayerPeer.transfer_channel]).

members.name: _SetTransferMode
members.summary: Called when the transfer mode is set on this [MultiplayerPeer] (see [member MultiplayerPeer.transfer_mode]).
